news.summary: In Dallas, RGP has appointed Jennifer Jones as its inaugural Chief Marketing Officer (CMO). This development marks a significant milestone for the organization.
news.headline: RGP appoints Jennifer Jones as first Chief Marketing Officer.
US APRIL INDUSTRIAL PRODUCTION UNCHANGED M/M; EST. +0.1%

news.summary: In a recent development, Savi has unveiled an innovative AI Assistant tool that is now accessible to millions of union members through a collaborative effort with Union Plus.
news.headline: Savi launches first AI assistant for student loans, offering relief to millions of borrowers in partnership with Union Plus.

news.summary: Iodine Software, a prominent player in healthcare AI for revenue cycle optimization, has unveiled the latest version of its pre-bill tool in Austin, Texas. Known as AwarePre-Bill, this solution is crafted to aid health systems in bridging significant revenue shortfalls before claims are finalized. Drawing on a track record of effectiveness, this offering empowers health systems to perform retrospective reviews that target financial aspects, thus enhancing code precision and documentation accuracy to optimize reimbursement levels. Through Iodine, customers gain access to a platform that facilitates this crucial financial review process.
news.headline: Iodine Software launches AwarePre-Bill solution to close revenue gaps, improve code accuracy for right-sizing reimbursement.

news.summary: EnerSys, a renowned global provider of energy solutions for industrial needs, was recognized for its exceptional achievement at the Data Centre Review Excellence Awards 2025. The company, listed on NYSE as ENS, claimed victory in the Data Centre Backup Power Solution of the Year category. This recognition was received at a prestigious event held on May 14 at London's Oxo Tower. EnerSys delegates accepted the award with pride amidst a panel of esteemed judges.
news.headline: EnerSys (NYSE: ENS) honored with Data Centre Backup Power Solution of the Year award at DCR Excellence Awards 2025.

news.summary: Houston-based energy company Phillips 66 has recently revealed a deal to sell off a significant portion of its retail marketing business in Germany and Austria. This agreement involves a transfer of majority ownership stake. The move is part of the company’s strategic plan for restructuring its operations and focusing on key markets. The specific details of the deal, including the percentage of ownership being divested and the financial terms, have not been disclosed yet.
news.headline: Phillips 66 to sell majority stake in Germany, Austria retail business.

news.summary: The recent price surge of Ethereum (ETH) has sparked optimism in the altcoin market, as analysts predict a full-scale altcoin bull market by 2025. Matthew Sigel, Head of Digital Assets Research at VanEck, noted during a Wolf of All Streets podcast episode with Scott Melker that Ethereum's 44% weekly increase has shifted the sentiment in the sector. Sigel mentioned that this surge signifies the beginning of an altcoin bull market, highlighting the outperformance of assets like Dogecoin (DOGE) and Solana (SOL) compared to Bitcoin (BTC). He credited the rise of ETH to various catalysts. Information can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Ethereum's surge sparks optimism for altcoins with experts predicting a bull market in 2025. ETH up 44% weekly.
PHILLIPS 66 TO SELL STAKE IN GERMANY, AUSTRIA MARKETING UNIT

news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) has announced an enticing iPhone promotion, aiming to simplify the switching process for customers. As part of their latest offer, T-Mobile is providing customers with a complimentary iPhone 16 Pro, with no trade-in required. Additionally, T-Mobile is committed to assisting customers in paying off their existing devices from other carriers by covering up to $800 per line. This limited-time offer marks T-Mobile's most exceptional iPhone deal to date, exclusively available on their Experience Beyond plan, renowned for its value-packed features.
news.headline: Switch to T-Mobile and get a free iPhone 16 Pro, no trade-in required, while they also cover up to $800 per line for current phone payoffs.

news.summary: A partnership has been established between Ingenium and Veolia North America, with the aim of granting access to Veolia’s upcoming high-temperature treatment plant in Gum Springs, Arkansas, set to open in 2025. The purpose of this collaboration is to meet the increasing need within the industry for waste treatment capabilities. As part of the agreement, Ingenium will also have secured access to capacity in Veolia's current thermal, landfill, and fuel blending sites across the United States. This development addresses the necessity for waste management solutions, and is a significant step in ensuring future operational requirements are met effectively.
news.headline: Ingenium and Veolia NA partner for waste treatment capacity in Arkansas, new facility by 2025, guaranteed access to Veolia's existing facilities in US.

news.summary: New York-based White Oak Commercial Finance (WOCF), a division of White Oak Global Advisors, has revealed the provision of a $125 million asset-based revolving credit line to a US energy services firm. Acting as the exclusive lender, WOCF has committed the entire $125 million in this deal. This credit facility is designed to bolster the financial maneuverability and cash reserves of the energy company. The company stressed the importance of the energy industry in the nation's economic development and stability.
news.headline: White Oak Commercial Finance provides $125M ABL facility to US energy services company to boost financial flexibility.

news.summary: Retail powerhouse Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT) released its first-quarter FY26 financial results on Thursday. The company saw a 2.5% year-on-year sales increase to $165.60 billion, slightly below the anticipated $165.88 billion. Adjusted earnings per share came in at 61 cents, surpassing the expected 58 cents. Global eCommerce sales surged by 22% Y/Y, driven by store-based pickup & delivery services and marketplace growth. Walmart U.S. reported a 4.5% rise in comparable sales, excluding fuel, fueled by health & wellness and grocery sectors. Sam's Club also experienced a 6.7% Y/Y increase in same-store sales, excluding fuel. The gross margin rate increased by 12 basis points, with Walmart U.S. leading the way. Operating income rose by $0.3 billion (4.3% increase), and adjusted operating income climbed by 3.0% in constant currencies. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Walmart's Q1 sales growth was 2.5% to $165.60 billion, eCommerce sales skyrocketed 22% Y/Y, Walmart U.S. comp sales rose by 4.5%, Sam's Club comp sales increased by 6.7%. CEO highlights cost pressures from tariffs, particularly impacting China.

news.summary: Premier, Inc. revealed the names of the nation's top 15 health systems in their recent study. This annual analysis, exclusive to Premier, is the most thorough examination of data for top-performing health systems in the country. The study indicated that if all health systems operated at the same high level as the current top performers, an estimated 171,000 more lives could have been saved, along with over 336,000 additional benefits.
news.headline: Premier Inc. reveals top 15 Health Systems, show they could save over 171,000 lives if all systems operated at same level.

news.summary: In Lehi, Utah, Entrata, a top operating system for multifamily communities, revealed a $200 million minority investment from funds managed by Blackstone, valuing the company at $4.3 billion. This investment marks a significant move for Entrata's growth journey, focusing on enhancing the rental housing industry with advanced technology to simplify property management operations and enhance the living standards for millions of residents. With over twelve million residents benefited, Entrata is geared towards further expansion and innovation.
news.headline: Entrata gets $200M from Blackstone at $4.3B valuation for growth in rental housing technology. Moving ahead with improving operations.

news.summary: In Denver, AIR Communities has achieved its first certification as a Great Place To Work, with a notable 88% of employees expressing satisfaction with their workplace. The recognition, solely determined by feedback from current staff, highlights the organization's commitment to fostering a positive company culture. AIR Communities' Senior Vice President of Human Resources, Beth Ha, credited their focus on building a cohesive and supportive environment for the substantial increase in employee engagement.
news.headline: AIR Communities receives 2025 Great Place To Work Certification with 88% employee affirmation.

news.summary: Champion Homes, Inc. (NYSE: SKY) based in Troy, Michigan, has rescheduled the announcement of its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 earnings results. The new date for the release is on Tuesday, May 27, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call to discuss the financial results will be held at 8:30 A.M. Eastern Time on the same day. Stakeholders and investors can tune in to a live webcast of the call.
news.headline: Champion Homes reschedules Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings report to May 27, 2025 with call at 8:30 A.M. Eastern Time.

news.summary: Stratus Properties Inc., a real estate company operating in Austin, Texas and other Texas markets, has released its first-quarter 2025 financial results. The company reported a net loss of $(2.9) million, or $(0.36) per diluted share, for the quarter. This marks a significant decrease from the previous year's net income of $4.6 million, or $0.56 per diluted share. Stratus Properties Inc. is focused on residential and retail properties in the Austin area and select markets in Texas.
news.headline: Stratus Properties Inc. reports $(2.9) million net loss in first-quarter 2025, compared to $4.6 million net income.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, SoundHound AI, Inc. (Nasdaq: SOUN) shared results from a study indicating a growing trend in consumer interest in ordering food through in-vehicle voice assistants. The study highlights a move towards voice commerce, with consumers showing enthusiasm for integrating ordering, payments, loyalty, and navigation through car voice assistants. This technology aims to offer a smooth, hands-free experience solely driven by voice commands.
news.headline: Research by SoundHound AI shows 80% of U.S. drivers prefer ordering food with in-car voice assistants, leading to a shift in voice commerce.
$PSX - PHILLIPS 66 REPORTS TO DIVEST INTEREST IN GERMAN, AUSTRIA

news.summary: Super Akí, a well-known Mexican grocery retail chain operating 51 stores along with a distribution center and e-commerce channels, has made the strategic decision to partner with RELEX Solutions, an expert in supply chain and retail planning solutions. By leveraging the RELEX unified platform, Super Akí aims to enhance various aspects of their operations such as supply chain planning, pricing and promotion management, and space planning. These improvements are particularly important in the grocery retail sector, where precise forecasting plays a vital role in managing fresh produce, perishables, and other essential items. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards optimizing Super Akí's processes and ensuring efficient operations in their stores and online platforms.
news.headline: Mexican grocery chain Super Akí partners with RELEX for supply chain and retail planning in 51 stores and e-commerce.

news.summary: Based in Berkeley, California, Raisewell Ventures ("Raisewell") is a venture firm specializing in high-growth sectors such as climate, manufacturing, and health. They focus on challenging the norm in the startup industry while aiming for a significant economic impact. Recently, Founder and Managing Partner Jeep Kline has been assigned to the board of Robot.com, previously known as Kiwibot. Robot.com is a rapidly expanding AI-powered robotics company and a part of Raisewell's investment portfolio. This move signifies Raisewell's commitment to innovative technologies and its strategic investments.
news.headline: Jeep Kline joins board of Robot.com, an AI-powered robotics company, part of Raisewell Ventures, focusing on high-growth sectors.

news.summary: In New York, Deliverect, a prominent global food technology Software as a Service (SaaS) firm, unveiled Resolve, an advanced AI-driven solution addressing a major issue faced by multi-location restaurants: Missing and Incorrect (M&I) errors and unwarranted refund claims. Powered by Google's Gemini Models and Google Cloud's Vertex AI platform, Resolve incorporates cutting-edge visual AI technology to enhance order precision and equip restaurants with the expertise to mitigate revenue losses.
news.headline: Deliverect launches Resolve AI to improve order accuracy and reduce unjust refund claims in multi-location restaurants.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, the Texas Immersive Institute (TXI) at the University of Texas at Austin's Moody College of Communication has wrapped up a semester-long project with HTC VIVERSE. This partnership has led to the development of seven unique virtual worlds that highlight the capabilities of browser-based storytelling with WebXR technology. Notably, this collaboration serves as HTC's inaugural significant academic venture utilizing VIVERSE Create, a WebXR platform enabling the creation and navigation of 3D spaces directly via a web browser.
news.headline: TXI at UT Austin partners with HTC VIVERSE to create 7 virtual worlds using WebXR, first academic collaboration for HTC.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Warner Bros. Games has unveiled DC Worlds Collide, a fresh mobile squad RPG based on the DC universe. The game is now open for pre-registrations, allowing fans to reserve their spots in advance.
news.headline: Warner Bros. Games introduces DC Worlds Collide, a new mobile RPG set in the DC universe. Pre-registrations open.

news.summary: A biotech startup, SpotitEarly, based in Englewood, New Jersey, has launched in the U.S. market with a focus on revolutionizing cancer screening. The company utilizes artificial intelligence and canines to analyze volatile organic compounds (VOCs) in breath samples to detect cancer at its initial stages. SpotitEarly has successfully raised $20.3 million in funding to support its growth and enhance its cancer detection technology. This investment is crucial for expanding SpotitEarly's presence in the U.S. market. Noteworthy is the technology's impressive accuracy rate of 94 percent.
news.headline: SpotitEarly launches in U.S. with $20.3M, plans to revolutionize cancer detection using AI and canines, achieving 94% accuracy.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Salesforce, a leading AI CRM company listed on NYSE with the ticker CRM, has announced a new pricing structure for Agentforce to cater to the rising need for digital labor across various facets of businesses. The company aims to address the surging demand for AI adoption, which is progressing rapidly. Despite the acceleration in AI implementation, many Chief Information Officers (CIOs) are finding it challenging to balance cost management with the necessity for innovation. Data from Salesforce’s CIO AI Trends research revealed that 90% of respondents face constraints in controlling AI expenses.
news.headline: Salesforce launches flexible Agentforce pricing to meet growing demand for digital labor. AI adoption rises rapidly, with 90% of CIOs facing challenges in managing costs.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Amplitude (Nasdaq: AMPL) revealed a key partnership with Twilio Segment to assist businesses in consolidating customer data, identifying behavioral patterns, and providing tailored digital experiences on a large scale. The collaboration, introduced at Twilio’s SIGNAL 2025 event, involves Amplitude endorsing Twilio Segment as the premier customer data platform (CDP), while Twilio will advocate for Amplitude as the premier digital analytics solution. This partnership aims to streamline data management processes and enhance customer engagement across various platforms.
news.headline: Amplitude (Nasdaq: AMPL) partners with Twilio Segment to enhance customer data and digital experiences at scale.

news.summary: Thru's recent acquisition by Boomi in Conshohocken, Pa. has bolstered Boomi's managed file transfer (MFT) strength, merging API, application, and file-based data transport into a unified platform.
news.headline: Boomi acquired Thru, Inc. to bolster MFT capabilities, combining API, app, and file transfer on a single platform.

news.summary: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. has introduced GitLab 18, featuring integrated AI capabilities and significant advancements in core DevOps, security, and compliance workflows. These enhancements are currently accessible, with ongoing improvements expected in the future. Moreover, GitLab Premium users can now acquire Duo Enterprise without needing to upgrade to GitLab Ultimate.
news.headline: GitLab releases version 18, introducing AI features to boost developer productivity. Duo Enterprise now available for Premium customers.

news.summary: Danvers, Massachusetts - CCC will be presenting new features that empower academic publishers to automate various promotional and publication incentives for authors. This will streamline the process and provide authors with improved opportunities.
news.headline: CCC introduces expanded RightsLink author services to enable publishers automate promotional offers to authors.

news.summary: In Beverly, Massachusetts, Object First, the creator of Ootbi (Out-of-the-Box-Immutability), a ransomware-proof backup storage appliance tailored for Veeam®, disclosed a remarkable 167% surge in bookings for Q1 2025. This growth showcases a growing momentum as customers and partners recognize the value of immutable backup storage grounded in Zero Trust principles as the most effective safeguard against ransomware and cyber threats. The company's success underscores the global emphasis on data security.
news.headline: Object First reports a 167% increase in global bookings in Q1 2025, highlighting the demand for ransomware-proof backup storage.

news.summary: Today, Tractor Supply Company, based in Brentwood, Tennessee, divulged that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share for the Company's common stock.
news.headline: Tractor Supply Company declares $0.23 per share on common stock as quarterly dividend.

news.summary: In GOLETA, California, HOKA®, a part of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), has introduced the Mafate X, the newest addition to their renowned trail collection. Initially launched 15 years ago at UTMB Mont-Blanc, the Mafate has remained a cornerstone in HOKA's trail shoe lineup. The Mafate franchise, known as a HOKA classic, has been inspiring trail runners worldwide. The Mafate X aims to continue this tradition, offering enhanced comfort and performance to help runners go farther and faster on trails.
news.headline: HOKA launches Mafate X, evolving its iconic trail shoe for modern ultra racing. Original Mafate debuted 15 yrs ago at UTMB. Brand's legacy continues globally.

news.summary: In New York, Regal.ai, a top Voice AI Agent Platform, has unveiled two innovative experiential campaigns, The AI Dog Hotline and The Voice of AI, which have collectively reached an impressive five million impressions within a short span of three months. This showcases the advanced features, human-like qualities, and tailored capabilities of Regal's voice AI technology. Noteworthily, The AI Dog Hotline was introduced on the day of the renowned Westminster Kennel Club Dog Show, enabling dog enthusiasts worldwide to interact with AI replicas of their beloved pets.
news.headline: Regal.ai's AI campaigns 'AI Dog Hotline' and 'The Voice of AI' impress with 5 million impressions in 3 months, highlighting their sophisticated voice AI technology.

news.summary: Big Blue Swim School, a rapidly expanding franchise in the $3 billion learn-to-swim sector, has named Brandon Bean as its new Chief Executive Officer. Bean has more than 20 years of experience in leading franchise and multi-unit operations, notably as the co-founder and CEO of Lumin Fitness, a technology-driven fitness brand. Prior to his role at Lumin Fitness, he held the position of Chairman and CEO at Gold’s Gym. This move marks a significant step for Big Blue Swim School as they continue to grow in the industry.
news.headline: Big Blue Swim School names Brandon Bean CEO, with 20 years of experience in franchise industry.

news.summary: In a recent report released by Rithum, it was shown how returns are influencing the retail sector leading up to 2025. This report highlighted the need for brands and retailers to take proactive steps to safeguard their profits in response to changing consumer demands.
news.headline: Rithum's 2025 report highlights consumer expectations and strategic opportunities for retailers, as returns reshape retail industry.

news.summary: Xponential Fitness, Inc. revealed that Mark King, the current CEO, plans to retire from his positions as CEO and Director due to health concerns. As a primary global franchisor of boutique health and wellness brands, Xponential Fitness operates under the NYSE ticker symbol XPOF. King will remain in his role during the search for a successor to guarantee a seamless transition.
news.headline: Xponential Fitness CEO Mark King announces retirement due to health reasons, will stay as CEO during search for successor.

news.summary: Discover an ocean of excitement in Brooklyn, NY at the New York Aquarium during the Ocean Shell-a-bration Weekend, which is a festive three-day event highlighting the crucial importance of oceans in our lives.
news.headline: New York Aquarium hosts Ocean Shell-a-bration Weekend starting June 6 to celebrate oceans' importance.
TRUMP’S TRADE WAR RISKS US CAPITAL FLIGHT, WARNS HEDGE FUND ELLIOTT- FT
China to tighten control over AI data centers - The Information.

news.summary: The Fiber Broadband Association will be holding the 2025 Women in Fiber Luncheon at Fiber Connect 2025 in Nashville, Tennessee. The event is scheduled for Tuesday, June 3, running from 12:00 PM to 1:30 PM CT. A donation to Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library, which offers book gifts monthly to over 3 million children in five countries, will be made for each ticket sold for the luncheon. This year’s luncheon will focus on celebrating women in the fiber industry.
news.headline: Dolly Parton's Imagination Library partners with Fiber Broadband Association for Women in Fiber Luncheon at Fiber Connect 2025; program gifts 3 million books monthly to children in five countries.

news.summary: The Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) unveiled the finalists for the 2025 FBA Awards, chosen from a pool of close to 100 submissions. This initiative honors exceptional accomplishments within the fiber broadband sector. The winners are set to be revealed during the FBA Awards Luncheon at Fiber Connect 2025 in Nashville, Tenn. These finalists epitomize the core of our industry, encompassing pioneers, visionaries, and champions who actively drive progress.
news.headline: Fiber Broadband Association unveils finalists for 2025 Awards from a pool of 100 submissions, winners to be announced at Luncheon.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, DNMiner, a cryptocurrency service provider based in Hong Kong, revealed its latest user-friendly cloud mining platform. This platform enables users to mine popular digital currencies like Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin without the need for specialized hardware or technical knowledge. DNMiner's new offering aims to provide a convenient entry point for individuals worldwide into cryptocurrency mining. The platform features daily payouts, automated processes, and various affordable plans, allowing users to engage in the crypto economy with minimal initial investment. In contrast to traditional mining methods that demand expensive equipment and ongoing maintenance, DNMiner manages all mining operations for its users.
news.headline: DNMiner introduces cloud mining platform for Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and more, enabling individuals worldwide to mine cryptocurrencies without specialized hardware. With daily payouts and automated processes, it offers affordable plans for easy entry into crypto mining.

news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, SIXT, a prominent provider of premium mobility services, has been crowned the top Rental Car Company in the United States in the 2025 USA TODAY 10Best Readers’ Choice Awards. This accolade, determined by reader votes, signifies the excellence endorsed by customers. SIXT stands out for its exceptional customer service, top-tier vehicle selection, and progressive expansion throughout North America following its establishment.
news.headline: SIXT named #1 Rental Car Company in USA Today 10Best Reader’s Choice Awards 2025 for top customer experience and growth.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Resmed, a prominent health technology company specializing in sleep, breathing, and home care, was announced as the Official Sleep Partner for the Qatar Airways British & Irish Lions Tour to Australia. This partnership signifies a significant milestone for Resmed (NYSE: RMD, ASX: RMD), highlighting its expertise in the field. The collaboration underscores the company's role in supporting the tour's participants and promoting optimal sleep health during the event. The inclusion of Resmed in this prestigious tour reflects its dedication to enhancing sleep quality and respiratory care on a global scale.
news.headline: Resmed named Official Sleep Partner of Qatar Airways British & Irish Lions Tour to Australia 2025. (Numbers: May 15, 2025, NYSE: RMD, ASX: RMD)
Rogers Xfinity TV provides the largest content selection in Canada. #entertainment #Canada
